languages.text: {n}Наконец, одна из конечностей существа простирается в величественном жесте, после чего из узкой щели, пересекающей его лицо на месте рта, раздаются вполне понятные слова низкого готика:{/n} "Приветствую тебя в галереях Великого Музеона, посетитель". {n}Он произносит слова и ставит ударения совершенно правильно, но тон ксеноса лишен даже намека на человечность.{/n}

{n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Наконец, одна из конечностей существа простирается в величественном жесте, после чего из узкой щели, пересекающей его лицо на месте рта, раздаются вполне понятные слова низкого готика:{/n} "Приветствую тебя в галереях Великого Музеона, посетитель". {n}Он произносит слова и ставит ударения совершенно правильно, но тон ксеноса лишен даже намека на человечность.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but his tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

{n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

{n}Seeing the confusion on the faces of your retinue, the creature falls silent. Turning to the console beside it, it touches a few glyphs with a bony limb, after which perfectly intelligible speech pours forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is.{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor."

{n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but his tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

{n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

languages.text: {n}随行者たちの顔に浮かぶ困惑を目にして、その生き物は沈黙する。やがて傍らのコンソールへと向き直り、骨ばった肢でいくつかの象形文字に触れる。すると、口のあるべき場所から、完全に理解可能な言葉が流れ出した。{/n}「大美術館に訪れた貴方へ、挨拶を申し上げます」
languages.original_text: {n}Seeing the confusion on the faces of your retinue, the creature falls silent. Turning to the console beside it, it touches a few glyphs with a bony limb, after which perfectly intelligible speech pours forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is.{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor."

traits.locale_text: その姿は、まるで巨大な機械のようで、その顔の横の狭く深い口から、言葉が流れ出す。{n}「偉大なるミュージオンのギャラリーに訪れた貴方へ、挨拶を申し上げます。」

languages.text: {n}Por fin, una de las extremidades de la criatura se extiende en gesto altivo, tras lo cual empieza a hablar en Bajo Gótico perfecto a través de la fina ranura que cruza su cara donde normalmente habría una boca:{/n} «Te saludo en la galería del Gran Museion, visitante». {n}La pronunciación y entonación del xenos son perfectas, pero carecen por completo de humanidad.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Por fin, una de las extremidades de la criatura se extiende en gesto altivo, tras lo cual empieza a hablar en Bajo Gótico perfecto a través de la fina ranura que cruza su cara donde normalmente habría una boca:{/n} «Te saludo en la galería del Gran Museion, visitante». {n}La pronunciación y entonación del xenos son perfectas, pero carecen por completo de humanidad.{/n}

languages.text: {n}终于，那生物的一条肢体以高傲的姿态舒展开来。随后，从它脸上横着的那道充当嘴巴的狭缝中，涌出了清晰可辨的低哥特语：{/n}“欢迎来到大陈列馆的展厅，我向你致意，访客。”{n}这异形的发音和重音都无可挑剔，可语调却毫无人味。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}终于，那生物的一条肢体以高傲的姿态舒展开来。随后，从它脸上横着的那道充当嘴巴的狭缝中，涌出了清晰可辨的低哥特语：{/n}“欢迎来到大陈列馆的展厅，我向你致意，访客。”{n}这异形的发音和重音都无可挑剔，可语调却毫无人味。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Schließlich macht eine der Gliedmaßen der Kreatur eine ausladende Geste, ehe aus dem schmalen Schlitz, der ihren Mund ersetzt, verständliche Worte in Niedergotisch ertönen.{/n} "Ich darf Euch in den Galerien des Großen Museions begrüßen, {mf|Besucher|Besucherin}." {n}Aussprache und Betonung des Xenos sind makellos, aber der Klang seiner Stimme hat nichts Menschliches.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Schließlich macht eine der Gliedmaßen der Kreatur eine ausladende Geste, ehe aus dem schmalen Schlitz, der ihren Mund ersetzt, verständliche Worte in Niedergotisch ertönen.{/n} "Ich darf Euch in den Galerien des Großen Museions begrüßen, {mf|Besucher|Besucherin}." {n}Aussprache und Betonung des Xenos sind makellos, aber der Klang seiner Stimme hat nichts Menschliches.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sonunda yaratığın uzuvlarından biri yüce bir jestle uzanıyor, ardından yüzünde ağzının olduğu yeri kesen dar yarıktan kusursuzca anlaşılır Adi Gotik sözcükler dökülüyor.{/n} "Büyük Museion galerilerinde seni selamlıyorum ziyaretçi." {n}Zenonun telaffuzu ve kelime vurgusu kusursuz olsa da sesi insaniyetten bütünüyle yoksun çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sonunda yaratığın uzuvlarından biri yüce bir jestle uzanıyor, ardından yüzünde ağzının olduğu yeri kesen dar yarıktan kusursuzca anlaşılır Adi Gotik sözcükler dökülüyor.{/n} "Büyük Museion galerilerinde seni selamlıyorum ziyaretçi." {n}Zenonun telaffuzu ve kelime vurgusu kusursuz olsa da sesi insaniyetten bütünüyle yoksun çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Enfin, la créature tend un de ses membres osseux d'un geste élégant, tandis qu'un discours parfaitement intelligible, prononcé en bas gothique, jaillit de la fente étroite qui lui sert de bouche.{/n} « Je vous souhaite la bienvenue dans les galeries du Grand Muséion, visiteurs. » {n}Le xénos s'exprime de manière impeccable, mais son ton est dénué de la moindre trace d'humanité.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, one of the creature's limbs extends in a lofty gesture, after which perfectly intelligible words in Low Gothic pour forth from the narrow slit that crosses its face where its mouth is:{/n} "I offer my greetings to you in the galleries of the Great Museion, visitor." {n}The xenos's pronunciation and word stress are flawless, but the tone is devoid of humanity.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Enfin, la créature tend un de ses membres osseux d'un geste élégant, tandis qu'un discours parfaitement intelligible, prononcé en bas gothique, jaillit de la fente étroite qui lui sert de bouche.{/n} « Je vous souhaite la bienvenue dans les galeries du Grand Muséion, visiteurs. » {n}Le xénos s'exprime de manière impeccable, mais son ton est dénué de la moindre trace d'humanité.{/n}
